comment.body: Ride the trend wave, stop worrying so much about a pullback. What is the worst thing will happen you lose a couple hundred bucks. ATHs theres nothing stopping price. There are no distinct levels to say "this is where it will turn". It is really simple,  get long on pullbacks into demand. These demand levels can be Vwaps, EMA. or HTF institutional demands. The market will do the most obvious things in the most unobvious way. Trade the tape and stop thinking.

comment.body:
we are above the monthly upsdie target, i took monthly profit, i'm fine.
to be honest, guys, i'm a bit lost now in this market, i need some hours to investigate and think about whats going on...

momentum is very agressive, very pushy.
stock to bond monthly beta is positive, spot to vol beta is also positive and growing,
institutional outflow into cash and bonds is record high this month again, 0DTE activity is up,
and risk seems to be held high on purpose...

its a trade war, it is a tactic like in february... i just don't udnerstand it yet.. i need some hours
